title: Freedom

'''''Freedom''''' was an [[Imperial II-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Imperial II''-class Star Destroyer]] that served in the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic's]] starfleet. Prior to this she had served in the [[Imperial Navy/Legends|Imperial Navy]] under the name '''''Avarice'''''.

==Imperial service==
Little is known of the early history of the ''Avarice''. The ship came to be commanded by [[Sair Yonka]]. After the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]], [[Warlord/Legends|Warlord]] [[Zsinj]] attempted to recruit Yonka and the ''Avarice'' into his fleet, but Yonka refused to take any orders other than those coming from [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]]. Yonka sided with [[Ysanne Isard]], feeling that she represented the best chance to reestablish the Empire.

After Coruscant was captured by the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]], Yonka traveled to [[Thyferra/Legends|Thyferra]]. During this time he became increasingly disillusioned by Isard, and was disturbed over the use of biological weapons such the [[Krytos virus]] by Isard and the destruction of the [[Halanit]] colony.

Yonka was successfully bribed by [[Wedge Antilles/Legends|Wedge Antilles]] to leave [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] service. He and the crew of the ''Avarice'', which was renamed the ''Freedom'', confronted Isard's agents in the crew. These agents hijacked a shuttle and forced the ''Freedom''{{'s}} crew to destroy the shuttle.

==New Republic service==
Following the defection of the ''Freedom'', Yonka went on to assist [[Rogue Squadron/Legends|Rogue Squadron]] in the [[Bacta War]], and the Star Destroyer played a pivotal role in the [[Battle of Thyferra]].

When entering the Thyferra system, the captain of the ''[[Lusankya/Legends|Lusankya]]'' believed it was the Star Destroyer ''Virulence'', which sacrificed itself when the Rogues had caught it in a gravity well and tractor beams back at the [[Yag-prime|Yag'Dhul Station]]. After opening of comm system, the Star Destroyer revealed itself to be the ''Avarice'', renamed ''Freedom''. The ''Freedom'' attacked and distracted the ''Lusankya'' while Rogue Squadron did the damage to the ''Lusankya''.

The ''Freedom'' was heavily damaged in battle with the ''Lusankya''. After the Bacta War ended, the ''Freedom'' was integrated into the [[New Republic Defense Fleet/Legends|New Republic Defense Fleet]]. Yonka remained in command, and was given the rank of [[Commander/Legends|Commander]]. The ship was taken to the [[Shipyard/Legends|shipyards]] at [[Sluis Van/Legends|Sluis Van]] for repair and refitting.

The ''Freedom'' was still being retrofitted at the [[Sluis Van Shipyards]] at the time they were hit by [[Grand Admiral/Legends|Grand Admiral]] [[Mitth'raw'nuruodo/Legends|Thrawn's]] forces. The ''Freedom'' escaped targeting by the [[Plasma-Jet Mole Miner|mole miners]], and fought in the ensuing [[Battle of Sluis Van]]. It later fought in the [[Battle of Bilbringi (9 ABY)|Battle of Bilbringi]], where it once more survived undamaged (although at least one of its support craft were destroyed), and again in the campaign against Prince-Admiral [[Delak Krennel]]'s [[Ciutric Hegemony]] forces.
